title: Tyrannosaurus rex vs. Triceratops
alt: Scientifically accurate paleoart of a Tyrannosaurus rex seizing a Triceratops in a muddy river delta at golden hour — two Late Cretaceous giants locked in combat, rendered as hyper-realistic wildlife photography.
description: Tyrannosaurus rex vs. Triceratops — a fine-art paleoart print capturing the apex predator of the Late Cretaceous lunging at a horned Triceratops in the shallows of a primeval river delta, dust and water flying in low golden light. Two of the most iconic dinosaurs of the Hell Creek world, rendered with scientific accuracy and the intimacy of modern wildlife photography. Museum-quality dinosaur wall art for collectors, paleontology enthusiasts, and anyone who wants the lost world on their wall.
caption: A Tyrannosaurus rex clashes with a Triceratops in the muddy shallows of a Late Cretaceous river delta — two icons of the Hell Creek world captured like modern wildlife photography.
